landing.heroTitle: Keep your rentals clear and ready for tax season
landing.heroCopy: HabitatLog helps small landlords in France track rent, tenants, documents, expenses and tax exports in one simple workspace.
landing.proof: Built for owners with 1 to 20 units, LMNP, shared flats and furnished rentals.
landing.painTitle: Replace the Excel + Drive + inbox chaos
landing.painCopy: Find missing receipts before tax season, not during it.
landing.featuresCopy: Focus on the essentials. The interface is designed to be efficient, not decorative.
landing.featurePropertiesCopy: See properties, rooms and rented units with their rent, leases and documents.
landing.featureRentCopy: Mark payments as received, spot delays and keep a clear monthly record per tenant.
landing.featureReceiptsCopy: File leases, invoices, insurance documents, receipts and supporting evidence in one place.
landing.featureTaxCopy: Prepare an annual CSV, PDF or ZIP package to share with your accountant.
landing.pricingCopy: Start free, then choose the volume that matches your rental portfolio.

free.name: Free
free.description: For trials or users managing one room.

solo.name: Solo
solo.description: For small landlords, LMNP owners and shared-flat landlords.

plus.name: Plus
plus.description: For owners with multiple rooms or several small properties.

portfolio.name: Portfolio
portfolio.description: For semi-professional landlords and small investors.

custom.name: Custom
custom.description: For larger portfolios or special requirements.

landing.finalCopy: Join landlords who choose clarity over complexity.

auth.title: Login
auth.subtitle: Use your email and password to access your rental workspace.

errors.signup_failed: Could not create the account. Check the email and password.

registered.check_email: Registration submitted. Check your email to confirm the account.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: A clear view of rents, documents and tax tasks.

properties.title: Properties
properties.subtitle: Manage properties, rooms and rented units.

tenants.title: Tenants
tenants.subtitle: Track tenants, leases, deposits and rental periods.

documents.title: Documents
documents.subtitle: File leases, invoices, insurance and supporting documents by property and period.

tax.title: Tax pack
tax.subtitle: Prepare a clear annual export for your accountant.
tax.disclaimer: Categories are indicative and do not replace tax advice.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Country, language, billing and data export.
